rulings.Case Title: THE ROBERT PAGE COLEMAN 2009 SPECIAL NEEDS TRUST A TRUST CREATED BY SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #7, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 2/7/23. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: No ex parte petition has been filed yet to increase bond. What were "the actual services provided" by the trustee? Notwithstanding his qualifications and assumption of risk, etc., this appears to be a very straightforward trust administration. Please file the trustee's time sheets. (A third party was also paid $206.25 on 10/15/20 for "accounting services" without further description.) Why was the payment for attendant care on 1/13/22 so much higher for just two invoices than for the others in May and June 2022? Who was the original payee for the $229.86 reimbursed to the trustee on 3/15/21? It would have been helpful if the medical transport costs had shown the dates such services were provided, or was each of those three payments to Silver Ride for just one excursion? Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 1/27/23. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: GUARDIANSHIP OF KRISABELLE WING ZHAO
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #4, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) Receipts schedule is missing $8,100 in rental income, which Guardian states was inappropriately deposited into his personal, of which $8,000 was transferred back (and $100 transferred after accounting period). 2) $2,500 (separate from $8,100 rental income) was transferred from the guardianship to guardian, which has not yet been returned. 3) Attorney requests $9,065 at $500/hr. Remote appearances should be made whenever possible. Please review Local Rule 14.1. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 160 225 4765 Password: 514879 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above.

rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF MARION HALL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Relief From Breach Of Conservatoship, To Remove Conservator And Appoint Successor Conservator And Objection To Post-Move Notice Of Chnage Of Residence Of Conservatee
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 1/25/23 to be heard with the accounting. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: No proposed order. [LRSF 14.7 A. and 14.59 E.] The proof of service is incomplete at item 4a (date of mailing). The authority cited in paragraph 17 of the petition is not the correct one: Probate Code Section 2640 authorizes a conservator to petition for compensation. The petition itself was not signed and verified by the petitioner. It appears that she filed a "Declaration" on 11/30/22, presumably in support of her own petition. A proposed successor conservator must file the mandatory Judicial Council form DE-310 with all supporting documents. Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 1/13/23. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ALBERT SAMARIS SPECIAL NEEDS TRUST, DATED OCTOBER 15, 2004
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 2/7/23. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: Another "amended petition" was filed on 11/17/22 but (1) it was actually the second amended petition and (2) it was not e-filed until 11/18/22, only after which e-filing date notice should have been mailed in order for notice to be correct. As previously noted, notice is defective if mailed before the actual filing (e-filing) of the pleading requiring notice. (A proof of service attached to a pleading, in any event, is not proper notice for Probate matters; the only proper form of notice is the mandatory Judicial Council form DE-120.) The proof of service filed on 11/22/22 is incomplete at item 4a and was not properly verified (undated). Since this (second) amended petition was the one signed and verified by the trustee, the erroneous caption will be overlooked this time. There was no filing fee of $450 on or around 5/9/22 and no appearance requiring CourtCall costs around 5/10/22. The filing fee for this petition was $200, not $247.08. Costs must be fully itemized, not set forth in a lump sum. (Providing the actual date a cost was incurred would be helpful.) Why is the attorney, not the paralegal, copying and sending documents, assembling petitions and exhibits, and preparing notices? The attorney's supplement must be filed to clarify the costs and to address the question regarding the reasonableness of the legal services provided. Notice of Hearing must be served at least 30 days before 2/7/23. It would be good if the notice showed that the "amended petition" to be heard is the one that was filed on 11/17/22, since there are two "amended" petitions. A courtesy copy of the attorney's supplement and the proof of service must be received by the assigned examiner by 1/27/23. (There is NO LRSF 14.91.) Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. NB: Except for exhibits, each paper filed with the court must bear a footer in the bottom margin of each page, placed below the page number and divided from the rest of the document page by a printed line. [CRC 2.110(a).]

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF HANG FA FAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required to address the delay in opening up the estate. Remote appearances should be made whenever possible. Please review Local Rule 14.1. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 160 225 4765 Password: 514879 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above.

rulings.Rulings: Continued to 2/22/23 at Counsel's request. A proposed order and courtesy copies of the petition and all supporting papers must be received by the examiner by 2/10/23.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF RAYMOND LOW SUEN SR.
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
